blocks.original:
---
name: run-<unit-name>
description: Build, run, and drive <unit-name>. Use when asked to start <unit-name>, run its tests, build it, take a screenshot of its UI, or interact with the running app.
---
blocks.zh:
---
名称：运行-<单位名称>
描述：构建、运行和驱动<unit-name>。当要求启动 <unit-name>、运行其测试、构建它、截取其 UI 的屏幕截图或与正在运行的应用程序交互时使用。
---

blocks.original:
<One-sentence description: what this is and how an agent drives it.
Name the handle here — "drive it via
`.claude/skills/run-<unit-name>/driver.mjs` under xvfb" for a desktop
app, or "start the dev server then drive it via `chromium-cli`" for a
web app — so an agent knows where to look first.>
blocks.zh:
<一句话描述：这是什么以及代理如何驱动它。
在这里命名句柄 - “通过
对于桌面，xvfb 下的 `.claude/skills/run-<unit-name>/driver.mjs`
应用程序，或“启动开发服务器，然后通过 `chromium-cli` 驱动它”
网络应用程序 - 这样代理就知道首先要查看哪里。>

blocks.original:
<If the unit isn't at repo root:>
All paths below are relative to `<unit-dir>/`.
blocks.zh:
<如果该单元不在存储库根目录：>
下面的所有路径都是相对于 `<unit-dir>/` 的。

blocks.original: ## Prerequisites
blocks.zh: ## 先决条件

blocks.original:
<System-level requirements. The exact `apt-get install` line you ran —
not a generic list, the one that actually worked. Target Ubuntu.>
blocks.zh:
<系统级要求。您运行的确切“apt-get install”行 -
不是一个通用的列表，而是真正有效的列表。目标 Ubuntu。>

blocks.original:
```bash
sudo apt-get update
sudo apt-get install -y <packages-you-actually-installed>
```
blocks.zh:
````bash
sudo apt-get 更新
sudo apt-get install -y <您实际安装的软件包>
````

blocks.original: <Runtime versions if they matter:>
blocks.zh: <运行时版本（如果重要的话）：>

blocks.original:
```bash
# Example: Node 20 via nvm, Python 3.12 via uv, etc.
```
blocks.zh:
````bash
# 示例：通过 nvm 的节点 20、通过 uv 的 Python 3.12 等。
````

blocks.original: ## Setup
blocks.zh: ＃＃ 设置

blocks.original:
<One-time setup after clone: install deps, configure, apply any
patches (feature-gate overrides, config stubs) with the exact command.>
blocks.zh:
<克隆后一次性安装：安装依赖项、配置、应用任何
使用确切的命令打补丁（功能门覆盖、配置存根）。>

blocks.original:
```bash
<commands>
```
<Env vars — required vs optional, with sensible defaults:>
blocks.zh: <环境变量 - 必需与可选，具有合理的默认值：>

blocks.original:
```bash
export FOO_API_KEY=...   # required — get from <where>
export BAR_MODE=dev      # optional — default is prod
```
blocks.zh:
````bash
导出 FOO_API_KEY=... # 必需 — 从 <where> 获取
export BAR_MODE=dev # 可选 — 默认为 prod
````

blocks.original: ## Build
blocks.zh: ＃＃ 建造

blocks.original: <Skip if no separate build step. Otherwise the exact command:>
blocks.zh: <如果没有单独的构建步骤，则跳过。否则确切的命令：>

blocks.original:
```bash
<command>
```
## Run (agent path)
blocks.zh: ## 运行（代理路径）

blocks.original:
<This is the section a future agent actually uses. If you built a
driver/REPL/smoke script, this documents how to launch it and what it
does. If the app is simple enough that `curl` or a one-liner suffices,
that one-liner goes here.>
blocks.zh:
<这是未来代理实际使用的部分。如果您构建了一个
driver/REPL/smoke 脚本，此文档记录了如何启动它以及它的用途
确实如此。如果应用程序足够简单，“curl”或一行代码就足够了，
那句台词就放在这里。>

blocks.original:
```bash
<launch-the-driver-or-smoke-script>
```
blocks.zh:
````bash
<启动驱动程序或烟雾脚本>
````

blocks.original:
<For REPL-style drivers, show the tmux wrapping. Poll for a ready marker
between send-keys and capture-pane — faster than a fixed sleep and fails
loudly instead of capturing a half-rendered screen:>
blocks.zh:
<对于 REPL 风格的驱动程序，显示 tmux 包装。轮询准备好的标记
在发送键和捕获窗格之间 - 比固定睡眠更快并且失败
大声地而不是捕获半渲染的屏幕：>

blocks.original:
```bash
tmux new-session -d -s app -x 200 -y 50
tmux send-keys -t app '<launch command>' Enter
timeout 30 bash -c 'until tmux capture-pane -t app -p | grep -q "<ready-marker>"; do sleep 0.2; done'
tmux send-keys -t app '<first driver command>' Enter
tmux capture-pane -t app -p
```
blocks.zh:
````bash
tmux 新会话 -d -s 应用程序 -x 200 -y 50
tmux send-keys -t app '<启动命令>' Enter
超时 30 bash -c '直到 tmux capture-pane -t app -p | grep -q "<就绪标记>";睡0.2；完成'
tmux send-keys -t app '<第一个驱动程序命令>' Enter
tmux 捕获窗格 -t 应用程序 -p
````

blocks.original: <Where artifacts land (screenshots, logs) — absolute paths:>
blocks.zh: <工件所在的位置（屏幕截图、日志）——绝对路径：>

blocks.original: Screenshots → `/tmp/shots/`. Logs → `/tmp/<app>.log`.
blocks.zh: 屏幕截图 → `/tmp/shots/`。日志 → `/tmp/<app>.log`。

blocks.original: <If the driver has commands, a table:>
blocks.zh: <如果驱动程序有命令，则有一个表：>

blocks.original:
| command | what it does |
|---|---|
| `<cmd>` | <description> |
## Run (human path)
blocks.zh: ## 运行（人类路径）

blocks.original:
<If meaningfully different from the agent path. Brief — agents won't
use this, humans can figure it out.>
blocks.zh:
<如果与代理路径明显不同。简述——代理商不会
使用这个，人类可以弄清楚。>

blocks.original:
```bash
<command>   # → <what happens>. <how to stop>.
```
blocks.zh:
````bash
<命令> # → <发生了什么>。 <如何停止>。
````

blocks.original: ## Test
blocks.zh: ＃＃ 测试

blocks.original:
```bash
<command>
```
<Expected result — "N suites pass", or specific known-flaky tests.>
blocks.zh: <预期结果 - “N 个套件通过”，或特定的已知不稳定测试。>

blocks.original:
<Optional sections below — include only if relevant and only with
content you actually hit, not generic advice.>
blocks.zh:
<下面的可选部分 - 仅在相关且仅与
您实际点击的内容，而不是一般建议。>

blocks.original: ## Gotchas
blocks.zh: ## 陷阱

blocks.original:
<Non-obvious traps. The things that look like they should work but
don't, with the workaround. If this section is generic, delete it.>
blocks.zh:
<不明显的陷阱。那些看起来应该有用的东西，但是
不要，有解决方法。如果此部分是通用的，请将其删除。>

blocks.original: - **<specific thing>** — <why it breaks> → <what to do instead>
blocks.zh: - **<特定事物>** — <为什么会损坏> → <该怎么做>

blocks.original: ## Troubleshooting
blocks.zh: ## 故障排除

blocks.original: <Symptom → fix. Only errors you actually encountered.>
blocks.zh: <症状→修复。仅是您实际遇到的错误。>

blocks.original: - **<exact error message or symptom>**: <cause>. <fix>.
blocks.zh: - **<确切的错误消息或症状>**：<原因>。 <修复>。

blocks.original:
NOTE ON THE FRONTMATTER ABOVE:
- Replace <unit-name> in both `name:` and `description:`. The `name:`
  becomes the slash command (/run-<unit-name>) and must match the
  directory name.
- The `description:` is what Claude scans to decide whether to load this
  skill automatically. Keep the verbs — "start," "run," "build," "test,"
  "screenshot" — they're what an asking agent will actually type.
blocks.zh:
关于上述前沿问题的注释：
- 替换“名称：”和“描述：”中的<单位名称>。 “名称：”
  成为斜杠命令 (/run-<unit-name>) 并且必须匹配
  目录名称。
- “描述：”是克劳德扫描的内容以决定是否加载它
  自动技能。保留动词——“开始”、“运行”、“构建”、“测试”
  “屏幕截图”——它们是询问代理实际输入的内容。

blocks.original:
NOTE ON THE DRIVER:
- If you wrote a driver script, it lives in this same directory (next
  to this file) by default. Reference it from the Run section.
- For a web app there's usually no driver file — the `chromium-cli`
  heredoc in the Run section is the harness.
- If the driver grows into something the project's test suite wants —
  shared launch helpers, a real e2e harness — move it to scripts/ or
  e2e/ in the unit, and update the paths here. The skill stays put.
blocks.zh:
驾驶员注意事项：
- 如果您编写了驱动程序脚本，它位于同一目录中（下一步
  默认情况下到此文件）。从“运行”部分引用它。
- 对于网络应用程序来说，通常没有驱动程序文件——“chromium-cli”
  运行部分中的heredoc是线束。
- 如果驱动程序成长为项目测试套件想要的东西 -
  共享启动助手，真正的 e2e 工具 - 将其移动到脚本/或
  e2e/ 单元中，并更新此处的路径。技能保持不变。

blocks.original: Delete everything from `---` above onwards before committing. --->
blocks.zh: 在提交之前删除上面从`---`开始的所有内容。 --->
